GESCO SE is a German industrial holding company that acquires and develops leading medium-sized companies in various industrial technology sectors, focusing on the "Mittelstand" segment.
RATIONAL AG is a German manufacturer of professional cooking appliances for large-scale kitchens and food service facilities.
HMS Bergbau AG is a German raw materials trading company specializing in the international trade of coal and other commodities.
Daimler Truck Holding AG is one of the world's largest commercial vehicle manufacturers, producing trucks and buses under brands such as Mercedes-Benz, Freightliner, Fuso, and Western Star.
Evotec SE is a drug discovery and development company that provides research solutions and services to pharmaceutical and biotechnology companies, as well as academic institutions worldwide.

Volkswagen AG is a German multinational automotive manufacturer headquartered in Wolfsburg, Lower Saxony, Germany, designing, manufacturing, and distributing passenger and commercial vehicles, motorcycles, engines, and turbomachinery.
